translation_text: The government that seems the most unwise,
Oft goodness to the people best supplies;
That which is meddling, touching everything,
Will work but ill, and disappointment bring.
Misery! - happiness is to be found by its side! Happiness!

chinese_text: 福兮禍之所伏。孰知其極？
translation_text: - misery lurks beneath it! Who knows what either will come to in the end? Shall we then dispense with correction?

chinese_text: 其無正。正復為奇，善復為妖。
translation_text: The (method of) correction shall by a turn become distortion, and the good in it shall by a turn become evil.
The delusion of the people (on this point) has indeed subsisted for a long time.
Therefore the sage is (like) a square which cuts no one (with its angles);
(like) a corner which injures no one (with its sharpness).
He is straightforward, but allows himself no license;
he is bright, but does not dazzle.
